data.body: READINESS DIRECTIVES (Joe) + context-window spike. #2 workflow-engine epic alias = soupy-spool-revel (6f2d; brainstorm IN FLIGHT in another session per Joe). #3 eval/threshold CALIBRATION reframed as POST-IMPLEMENTATION follow-on (NOT a pre-impl blocker; v1 ships intentionally HIGH thresholds, dogfood for real data) — explicit OUT-OF-SCOPE clarification added to 5fd2 (mirrors 9da1). #4/5 T11/T5a/T5b tier re-validation = POST-EPIC fine-tuning, noted. #6 SPIKE (subagent, web): real 2026 context windows — Claude Sonnet 4.6 + Opus 4.8 BOTH 1M-token standard (Haiku 200K); GPT-5.x/4.1 ~1M, Gemini ~1M (2M Vertex), Llama-4-Scout ~10M nominal. Fixed my placeholder 200K -> real ascending ladder in gate_lib (Haiku 200K -> Sonnet 1M -> Opus 1M; >1M cross-provider configurable). Implication: gate's working models hold ~1M, so escalation rarely fires + 'too big' only at >1M. #9 'ticket too big' meta-finding -> P8 reviewability/context-budget DET criterion (passes unless content/parent+child pairing exceeds or is anticipated to exceed the largest window at 1-criterion/call); added to DET floor child 012e + the coverage guard's DET registry (P1-P8). #10 COVERAGE re-decomposition: closed G3 gaps — claim child 092b (+E2E proving-check + config-preference enforcement), sidecar db7b (+latency/cost instrumentation), Pass-1 finder 1913 (+coaching-spec output), 012e (+P8); config TOOL/UX delegated to F5. #11 ISF: created dedicated child 681b-1f4b-6e07-44fa (build + validate: 2-STEP fed session-log+graph, summary-fallback w/ reduced confidence, eval recall/false-fire). All children pass check-ac+clarity; guard passes. Commits 70d895c7 (ladder+P8). Explained T9 (claim check-then-act TOCTOU -> verify+transition must be one atomic step; rebar claim already atomic) + T8 (DET tier named but not wired into the orchestrator exec-dispatch; make the DET executor explicit; P8/012e now home it).
